title: AgentVaultA2AExtensionParams
description: Extension parameters for the urn:agentvault:bounded-disclosure:v1 A2A extension.

public_key_hex.description: Ed25519 public key in hex encoding for signature verification.

supported_purposes.description: Purpose codes this agent accepts (e.g. COMPATIBILITY, MEDIATION).

relay_url.description: Preferred relay URL for sessions initiated with this agent.

afal_endpoint.description: AFAL HTTP base endpoint. Omit for A2A-only agents.

supports_precontract_negotiation.description: True if the agent supports pre-contract offer negotiation.

supports_bespoke_contract_negotiation.description: True if the agent supports bespoke (custom) contract negotiation.

supported_contract_offers.description: Contract offers this agent can fulfill.

card_signature.description: Ed25519 signature (hex) over the JCS-canonicalized AgentCardSignedPayload with VCAV-AGENT-CARD-V1: domain prefix.

hash.description: Content hash of the model profile.

supported_model_profiles.description: Model profiles supported for this contract offer.
